solutions.solution: (d) Number of smaller cubes which are unpainted = 8 cubes from inside + 10 cubes from two adjacent unpainted surfaces = 18 cubes
(c) 28 cubes from two adjacent surfaces painted red will have atleast red colour on their surfaces.
(d) 32 cubes from two opposite surfaces painted blue will have atleast one surface painted blue.
(b) 12 cubes present on the four edges common to blue and red surfaces will have two surfaces painted one with red colour and the other with blue colour.
(c) Only 2 cubes from the two corners will have three surfaces painted.
(d) Number of cubes having one face painted = Number of central cubes = 6 (n - 2)² = 6 (4 - 2)² = 6 × 4 = 24
(b) Number of cubes having two faces painted = Number of middle cubes = 12(n - 2) = 12(4 - 2) = 12 × 2 = 24
(c) Three faces painted cubes are always 8.
(d) It is clear from the figure that cubes having four faces painted = 0
(c) Required cubes = Inner central cubes = (n - 2)³ = (4 - 2)³ = 8
(c) Number of cubes having atleast one face painted in red = Number of cubes having one face painted in red + Number of cubes having two faces painted in red = 24 + 4 = 28
(c) Number of cubes having one or two faces painted = Number of cubes having one face painted + Number of cubes having two faces painted = 24 + 24 = 48
(b) Required number of cubes = (Number of cubes painted in green + black) + (Number of cubes painted in green + red) = (4 × 2) + (4 × 2) = 8 + 8 = 16
(b) Required number of cubes = Number of cubes painted in red on two adjacent faces + Number of cubes painted in black on two adjacent faces = 2 + 2 = 4
(d) It is clear from the figure that required number of cubes are zero in the given case.
(d) The total number of cubes have only one colour = (2 × 4) + (1 × 2) = 8 + 2 = 10
(b) The total number of cubes have no colour = 2 × 1 = 2
(c) The total number of cubes have any two colours = (4 × 2) + (8 × 1) = (8 + 8) = 16
(d) All the 16 cubes present on the boundary of this block will have atleast two colours.
(d) 24 smaller cubes will be formed.
(c) A total of 16 cubes will be left, if cubes with black as well as green colours are removed.
